details.description: Overcast daytime scene on a calm riverfront. In the foreground, colorful wooden tourist boats with canopies are moored side‑by‑side at a quay; they are painted in green, blue, red, and yellow and decorated with strings of Hoi An lanterns. The still water reflects the boats. The paved promenade has bollards, ropes, and a row of parked bicycles. Trees line the walkway, some hung with lanterns. Behind the promenade are weathered two‑story shophouses in Hoi An’s characteristic yellow stucco with dark timber shutters and tiled roofs, showing patina from age. The setting reads as the historic riverside of Hoi An Ancient Town along the Hoai River.

details.description: A riverside scene in Hội An, Vietnam, along the Hoài River. Colorful wooden boats are moored at a stone quay, their hulls painted in green, red, and blue with white canopies. Lanterns hang from the boats and reflect in the calm water. On the left, a paved promenade runs parallel to the river; a group of bicycles sits near pedestrians. In the background, a yellow-painted building with dark windows sits among trees, characteristic of Hội An’s riverfront architecture. Palm trees line the far bank, and the sky is overcast, giving soft, diffused light. The scene evokes the historic Hoài River waterfront near the ancient town, a popular spot for strolling and boat trips.

details.description: A lively riverside scene along the Hoai River in Hoi An, Vietnam. A stone promenade runs parallel to the water where colorful boats are moored at a dock, some with canopies and lanterns. On the left, a cluster of bicycles and pedestrians are near the quay. Across the promenade, a yellow, weathered building with a dark tiled roof sits among trees. In the background, palm trees line the river and more boats are visible under a cloudy sky, with reflections of the boats and lanterns dancing on the calm water.

details.description: A riverfront scene along the Hoai River in Hoi An Ancient Town under an overcast sky. In the foreground, several traditional wooden tourist boats are moored at a concrete pier. The most prominent boat features a hull painted green with red and blue stripes, a white wooden superstructure for passenger seating, and is decorated with hanging silk lanterns in green, yellow, and red. Its registration number, 'QNa 0358', is visible on the side. Behind it, other boats with similar designs are docked. To the left, the paved promenade of Bach Dang Street is visible, lined with parked bicycles, trees, and the iconic yellow-washed heritage buildings with clay tile roofs that characterize the historic district. People can be seen walking along the waterfront. The calm, murky water reflects the boats and the grey clouds above.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing the waterfront of Hoi An Ancient Town on an overcast day. In the foreground, several traditional wooden tour boats are docked at a concrete pier along the Hoai River. The boats are painted in vibrant shades of green, blue, and red, and are decorated with colorful lanterns in orange, green, and yellow. The calm, murky water reflects the boats and the grey sky. To the left, a paved promenade shows several bicycles parked near a classic street lamp, with people walking in the distance. The background features the iconic yellow-walled colonial-style buildings with dark tiled roofs that characterize the town's architecture, partially obscured by green trees.

details.description: Riverside scene with a row of small wooden passenger boats moored along a quay. The boats are painted in bright colors (green, red, blue) and decorated with hanging multicolored lanterns, a hallmark of local river cruises. Calm water reflects the hulls. On the paved promenade are bicycles, pedestrians, and trees also hung with lanterns. Behind the quay stand weathered mustard‑yellow two‑story shophouses with dark timber elements and tiled roofs—typical of Hoi An’s historic architecture. The river bends away lined with palms under an overcast sky.

details.description: A riverside quay scene in a Southeast Asian town. Colorful traditional wooden boats are moored along the bank, with white seating and canopies, and their hulls painted in green, blue, red, and white. The boats are decorated with hanging multicolored lanterns. On the left, a row of bicycles is parked near a paved promenade lined with trees. In the background, a yellow two‑story building with a rustic, historic appearance stands along the waterfront, contributing to a colonial-vernacular streetscape. The calm river mirrors the boats and lanterns, and palm trees along the shore add a tropical touch. The overcast sky creates soft, diffused lighting across the scene, suggesting a quiet daytime moment in a tourist-friendly harbor area.

details.description: Riverside scene on an overcast day with a calm, greenish river reflecting a row of colorful wooden boats. The boats have canopies and are decorated with multi-colored lanterns and life buoys, tied to a stone quay with bollards. On the promenade are parked bicycles and a few pedestrians. Across the quay stand weathered yellow plaster shophouses with dark timber details and tiled roofs, trees, and more lanterns—architecture typical of Hoi An’s historic old town. Palm trees line the far bank, and additional boats extend into the distance along the waterfront.

details.description: A tropical riverside promenade on a cloudy day. A row of colorful wooden boats is moored along a quay, their hulls painted in blue, green, and red with white roofs. Decorative lanterns in multiple colors hang above the boats, adding a festive touch. In the background, a yellow colonial-style building with a weathered facade sits near the water, flanked by palm trees. The paved walkway along the edge is populated with people and bicycles, while the calm river reflects the boats, lanterns, and surrounding foliage. Further along the water, additional boats are visible, suggesting a lively waterfront area that blends tourism with traditional harbor activity.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing the waterfront of Hoi An Ancient Town, Vietnam, on an overcast day. In the foreground, the murky waters of the Hoai River (a branch of the Thu Bon River) reflect the hulls of several traditional wooden tourist boats docked at a concrete quay. The boats are painted in vibrant green and blue with red accents and white railings, and are adorned with colorful silk lanterns in shades of green, yellow, and orange. The registration number 'QNa 0358' is visible on the side of the primary boat, indicating Quang Nam province. Behind the boats, a paved promenade features parked bicycles and pedestrians. The background showcases the iconic architecture of Hoi An: mustard-yellow heritage shophouses with weathered, mossy tiled roofs and dark wooden shutters, interspersed with mature trees.

details.description: A riverfront scene in Hoi An, Vietnam, featuring traditional wooden tour boats docked along a concrete pier on the Thu Bon River. The boats are painted in vibrant colors like green, blue, and red, and are decorated with colorful silk lanterns in shades of green, orange, and pink. One boat displays the registration number QN 0358. In the background, the iconic yellow-walled buildings of the Ancient Town with dark tiled roofs are visible behind lush green trees. A paved walkway runs alongside the river where several people and bicycles are gathered. The sky is overcast with grey clouds, and the calm water reflects the boats and the architectural elements of the shoreline.
